overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character navigates under an elevated highway, past digital billboards, and across busy intersections with futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban intersection beneath elevated highway

events.description: character transitions from standing to walking forward across the crosswalk
futuristic black sedan drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across a broad yellow-striped crosswalk under an elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan with glowing accents driving through the intersection
female pedestrian in white and red jacket walking ahead of the ego character

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with exposed beams and pipes spanning the street
broad pedestrian crossing with bold diagonal yellow stripes
thick cylindrical pillar supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway at night, with the character beginning to walk across a yellow-striped crosswalk. Futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection while neon signs glow in the background. The environment is sheltered beneath the overpass with artificial lighting from street lamps.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing regulatory signage

entered.detail: regulatory traffic sign indicating speed limit of 40 mounted on a pole
scattered papers and debris on the concrete sidewalk surface

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing a speed limit sign indicating 40. The area is sparsely populated with scattered litter visible on the ground. The overpass structure continues overhead with periodic support pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved commercial building with digital advertising displays

events.description: passing large illuminated digital billboards casting cyan and orange light onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past a curved building facade featuring large glowing digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large curved digital screens displaying advertisements with bright cyan and white graphics
building exterior with yellow paneled walls and metal roll-up doors

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved building featuring massive digital billboards that cast colorful neon light onto the street. The building has a distinctive yellow industrial facade on the lower level. Another pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction as the character continues under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with overhead directional signage

events.description: beginning to cross the multi-lane street alongside other pedestrians
large military-style armored vehicle drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk with other pedestrians while navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: green military-style truck with red stripes driving through the intersection
pedestrian in dark coat crossing the street alongside the ego character

entered.detail: overhead directional sign for Lincoln Highway and Downtown Plaza with yellow background
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow and white striped markings
traffic signal pole with illuminated walk indicator

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a busy intersection beneath the elevated highway, passing under a Lincoln Highway directional sign. Multiple pedestrians cross simultaneously while various futuristic vehicles, including a large military-style truck, navigate the intersection. The crosswalk features bold striped markings and pedestrian signals.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered overpass into a bustling, high-tech intersection. It begins under a massive elevated highway as the character crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst the glow of street lamps and passing futuristic vehicles. As the character continues along a concrete sidewalk, the camera passes a speed limit sign and scattered litter beneath the rhythmic sequence of overhead support pillars. The scene then shifts toward a curved building with a yellow industrial facade, where massive digital billboards cast vibrant, colorful light across the street as another pedestrian approaches. Finally, the movement leads the character across a busy intersection under a Lincoln Highway directional sign, weaving through a crowd of pedestrians and heavy military-style trucks.
